languages.text: "Позволь мне, досточтимый коллега, возможно ты допустил ошибку в декрипторных таинствах". {n}Эоганн с улыбкой отстраняет Паскаля, повторяя ритуалы открытия. Дверь остается запертой. Манипулус раздраженно пыхтит.{/n}

"Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Позволь мне, досточтимый коллега, возможно ты допустил ошибку в декрипторных таинствах". {n}Эоганн с улыбкой отстраняет Паскаля, повторяя ритуалы открытия. Дверь остается запертой. Манипулус раздраженно пыхтит.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door stays shut. The Manipulus puffs with irritation.{/n}

"Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door stays shut. The Manipulus puffs with irritation.{/n}

"Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}

"Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}

languages.text: «Permíteme, estimado colega. Quizá hayas errado en los ritos sagrados de la desencriptación». {n}Con una sonrisa, Eogunn invita a Pasqal a apartarse para repetir los ritos de apertura. La puerta sigue cerrada. El manipulus resopla con irritación.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Permíteme, estimado colega. Quizá hayas errado en los ritos sagrados de la desencriptación». {n}Con una sonrisa, Eogunn invita a Pasqal a apartarse para repetir los ritos de apertura. La puerta sigue cerrada. El manipulus resopla con irritación.{/n}

languages.text: “让我来吧，尊敬的同僚。也许你在神圣的解码仪式中出了点差错。”{n}伊奥贡微笑着，将帕斯卡轻轻推到一边，以重新执行开启仪式。然而大门依旧纹丝不动。操纵者恼怒地哼了一声。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “让我来吧，尊敬的同僚。也许你在神圣的解码仪式中出了点差错。”{n}伊奥贡微笑着，将帕斯卡轻轻推到一边，以重新执行开启仪式。然而大门依旧纹丝不动。操纵者恼怒地哼了一声。{/n}

languages.text: "Darf ich, geschätzter Kollege? Vielleicht ist Euch bei den heiligen Riten der Entschlüsselung ja ein Fehler unterlaufen." {n}Mit einem Lächeln schiebt Eogunn Pasqal zur Seite, um die Riten der Entsiegelung zu wiederholen. Die Tür bleibt geschlossen. Der Manipulus schnaubt irritiert.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Darf ich, geschätzter Kollege? Vielleicht ist Euch bei den heiligen Riten der Entschlüsselung ja ein Fehler unterlaufen." {n}Mit einem Lächeln schiebt Eogunn Pasqal zur Seite, um die Riten der Entsiegelung zu wiederholen. Die Tür bleibt geschlossen. Der Manipulus schnaubt irritiert.{/n}

languages.text: « Avec votre permission, cher collègue... Peut-être avez-vous commis une erreur dans les rites sacrés de déchiffrage. » {n}Tout sourire, Eogunn écarte Pasqal avant de réciter à son tour les formules de déverrouillage. Voyant que la porte reste obstinément close, le manipulus pousse un soupir contrarié.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Avec votre permission, cher collègue... Peut-être avez-vous commis une erreur dans les rites sacrés de déchiffrage. » {n}Tout sourire, Eogunn écarte Pasqal avant de réciter à son tour les formules de déverrouillage. Voyant que la porte reste obstinément close, le manipulus pousse un soupir contrarié.{/n}

languages.text: "İzin verin saygıdeğer meslektaşım. Belki de kutsal şifre çözme ayinlerinde hata yapmışsınızdır." {n}Gülümseyen Eogunn, mühür açma ayinlerini tekrarlamak için Pasqal'ı usulca kenara itiyor. Kapı kapalı kalıyor. Manipülus sinirle ofluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İzin verin saygıdeğer meslektaşım. Belki de kutsal şifre çözme ayinlerinde hata yapmışsınızdır." {n}Gülümseyen Eogunn, mühür açma ayinlerini tekrarlamak için Pasqal'ı usulca kenara itiyor. Kapı kapalı kalıyor. Manipülus sinirle ofluyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「失礼いたします、尊敬する同僚。解読の聖なる儀式の中で、あなたは誤りを犯したのかもしれません。」{n}笑顔でエオグンはパスカルを脇に避け、封印の儀式を繰り返す。しかし扉は開かなかった。マニピュラスは苛立ちを吐き出す。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Allow me, esteemed colleague. Perhaps you have erred within the sacred rites of decryption." {n}Smiling, Eogunn nudges Pasqal aside to repeat the rites of unsealing. The door remains shut. The Manipulus huffs with irritation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「失礼いたします、尊敬する同僚。解読の聖なる儀式の中で、あなたは誤りを犯したのかもしれません。」{n}笑顔でエオグンはパスカルを脇に避け、封印の儀式を繰り返す。しかし扉は開かなかった。マニピュラスは苛立ちを吐き出す。{/n}
